nonBlockingIssues.description: No compile-time const assertion on size_of::<CompositorConfig>() in either compositor/main.rs or init/main.rs. The feature description said to add one, and the prior review recommended it. Without it, the only guard against future field additions exceeding the 60-byte payload is the debug_assert in from_payload/payload_as, which is compiled away in release builds. A const assertion would be defense-in-depth.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add coding convention: 'repr(C) struct alignment: When using IPC from_payload/payload_as with repr(C) structs, verify size_of::<T>() (not just sum of field sizes) is <= 60. Struct size rounds up to the alignment of the largest field (u64 → 8-byte alignment). Always add a const assertion after the struct definition: const { assert!(core::mem::size_of::<T>() <= 60) }'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: proportional-font feature added prop_font_len (u32) to CompositorConfig, making fields sum to 60 bytes but actual struct size 64 bytes due to u64 alignment padding. Worker believed it was 60 bytes. This caused a 4-byte IPC buffer overflow (real UB). fix-compositor-config-overflow resolved it but did not add the const assertion. This convention would prevent recurrence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update test baseline count from '719+ tests' to '789+ tests' (768 system + 21 prototype as of beautiful-chrome-and-content completion).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: AGENTS.md currently says '719+ tests'. Actual count after M2: 789.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: os-worker skill should mention the 16 KiB stack constraint more prominently in its constraints section, including the -C opt-level=s compiler flag. Workers keep hitting this indirectly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: PNG decoder worker hit stack overflow with initial Huffman table approach (~98KB). Had to completely redesign. Same issue affected M1's gamma-correct-blending worker. Architecture.md documents it but the skill's constraints section doesn't quantify it.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: os-worker skill: for pure bug fixes with no new behavior (e.g., struct layout fixes), TDD step 2 (write tests first) can be noted as optional when the fix is validated by the existing test suite + visual verification.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-compositor-config-overflow worker deviated from TDD (no new test function) because the existing 768-test suite + visual verification fully validated the struct layout fix. Reasonable deviation for non-behavioral changes.
